stages.summary: Capture source, timestamp, raw tool result and integrity status.
Extract actors, relations, permissions and conflicts without upgrading inference to fact.
Map rules, exceptions, evidence strength and scenario knowledge.
Compare harm, reversibility, long-term impact and alternatives.
Check signed purpose, authorization, prohibited actions and human approval points.
Expose residual uncertainty, unresolved conflicts and recovery path.
